core.slogan: Spend time growing, not processing orders.
core.value_proposition: The ordering portal that makes your export business look world-class.

hero.title: Spend time growing,
hero.subtitle: Give your customers a professional ordering portal. Watch orders roll in. Focus on what matters.
hero.note: 14 days free • No credit card required

items.title: Endless email threads
items.description: Customers email orders. You copy to Excel. They ask for changes. You update. They ask again. Repeat forever.

items.title: Excel everywhere
items.description: Price lists, order forms, invoices... all in different Excel files. One wrong copy-paste and you've got problems.

items.title: Same questions, every day
items.description: 'What's the price for X?' 'What's the MOQ?' 'Do you have Y in stock?' Your team answers the same questions over and over.

items.title: Documents take forever
items.description: Proforma invoices, commercial invoices, packing lists... manually created for every single order.

solution.section_subtitle: ExportFlow gives your customers a professional ordering portal. They order themselves. You focus on growing.

benefits.title: Your own branded portal
benefits.description: Your logo, your colors, your domain. Customers see a professional storefront, not scattered emails.

benefits.title: Orders in, documents out
benefits.description: Customers place orders. Invoices, proformas, and packing lists generate automatically.

benefits.title: Works in any language
benefits.description: Your portal in English for customers, your dashboard in Chinese for your team. Everyone's happy.

benefits.title: Different prices for different customers
benefits.description: Distributors see distributor prices. Retailers see retail prices. Automatically.

steps.title: Import your products
steps.description: Upload your Excel product list. We'll organize it into a beautiful catalog.

steps.title: Invite your customers
steps.description: Send them the link to your portal. They create an account in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Watch orders roll in
steps.description: Customers browse, order, and you get notified. Documents generate automatically.

items.quote: Before ExportFlow, my team spent hours translating Excel orders to Chinese for production. Now ExportFlow does it for us! No more copy-paste to make invoices and export documents. Our customers order directly through their portal. It's like having an extra employee.
items.author: Sarah Chen
items.title: Operations Manager
items.highlight: It's like having an extra employee.

items.quote: My wholesale customers used to call or email with orders, and I would send them back an invoice made in Excel. Now I just watch the orders roll in and take action on any that need special attention. I can finally focus on finding new customers.
items.author: Michael Wang
items.title: Export Director
items.highlight: I just watch the orders roll in.

items.quote: Our customers used to email asking for prices, MOQs, specs... We spent hours answering the same questions. Now everything is in their portal. They browse, they order, we produce. Simple.
items.author: David Liu
items.title: Sales Manager
items.highlight: They browse, they order, we produce. Simple.

items.quote: When we sent our customers the link to their ordering portal, they were impressed. They said 'this looks like a Fortune 500 system'. We're just 15 people, but now we look world-class. ExportFlow paid for itself in the first month.
items.author: Mehmet Yılmaz
items.title: Founder
items.highlight: This looks like a Fortune 500 system.

items.quote: Before, adding more customers meant hiring more staff. Now our team of 4 handles what used to require 10 people. The portal does the heavy lifting.
items.author: Priya Sharma
items.title: COO
items.highlight: Our team of 4 handles what used to require 10.

pricing.section_subtitle: 14-day free trial with personalized onboarding. Save 15% with annual billing.
pricing.price_tiers_description: Set different price levels for different customer types. Assign each customer to a tier, and they automatically see their prices in the portal.
pricing.price_tiers_example: Example: Widget A → Distributor €10 | Retailer €12.50 | VIP €15
pricing.guarantee_text: Not satisfied? Get a full refund within 30 days. No questions asked.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! Try any plan free for 14 days. We'll personally help you set up your portal. No credit card required.

faq.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal. Annual plans can also pay by bank transfer.

faq.question: What are custom requests (Enterprise)?
faq.answer: Small customizations like adding a field, modifying a PDF template, or creating a simple report. Not major features or integrations.

features.page_title: Everything you need to manage export orders
features.page_subtitle: From product catalog to shipping documents, ExportFlow handles it all.

features_list.title: Branded Ordering Portal
features_list.description: Your customers get their own professional portal with your logo, colors, and domain. They browse your catalog, see their prices, and place orders 24/7.

features_list.title: Smart Product Catalog
features_list.description: Upload your Excel and we organize it into a beautiful, searchable catalog. Products with images, specs, MOQs, and stock levels.

features_list.title: Flexible Pricing (Price Tiers)
features_list.description: Different customers see different prices. Distributors, retailers, VIPs - each sees only their negotiated prices.

features_list.title: Order Management
features_list.description: All orders in one place. Track status, make modifications, handle substitutions. Your team works together seamlessly.

features_list.title: Automatic Documents
features_list.description: Proforma invoices, commercial invoices, packing lists - generated automatically from every order. No more manual document creation.

features_list.title: Multi-Language Support
features_list.description: Your portal in English, French, Spanish for customers. Your dashboard in Chinese for your team. Everyone works in their language.

contact.page_subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

signup.title: Start your free trial
signup.subtitle: 14 days free. No credit card required.
signup.login_link: Already have an account? Sign in

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your ExportFlow account
login.signup_link: Don't have an account? Start free trial

about.title: Built by exporters, for exporters
about.story: ExportFlow was born from frustration. After years of managing thousands of orders through scattered Excel files and endless email threads, our founder knew there had to be a better way. Late nights reconciling orders, customers asking 'did you receive my order?', documents created manually one by one... ExportFlow is the tool we wished existed.
about.short_story: Built by an exporter who was tired of Excel chaos and email overload.
about.location: Based in France. Serving exporters worldwide.
about.mission: Our mission: help export businesses look professional, save time, and focus on growth.
